Notice And Motion For Leave To File A Complaint In Intervention; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Proposed intervenor Roman Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco's motion for leave to file a complaint in intervention is granted. No current party has articulated any reason to deny this motion. Defendant Linda Fielder's request to be able to interplead the limits of her insurance policy must be made by separate motion.

FORMAL ORDER SIGNED.
